steps.t: Ramsa Twelling can be found in Gamwich. Adamanda North-took has asked you to bring the rope to Ramsa Twelling and have her weave it into a net.
Fresh honey can be found in hives near Ramsa's dwelling in Gamwich. Ramsa Twelling has asked you to collect honey from her hives.
Pello can be found in the Brimful Quiver, in Gamwich. You should bring the honey to Pello Hartstongue and exchange it for a bottle of mead.
The bottle of mead can be found in the Brimful Quiver, in Gamwich. Pello has given you permission to collect a bottle of mead from the back room.
Ramsa is in Gamwich. You should bring the mead to Ramsa Twelling.
The net is hanging next to Ramsa in Gamwich. Ramsa has asked for your assistance finishing the knots for the net she is making for Adamanda.
The net is hanging next to Ramsa in Gamwich. Ramsa has asked for your assistance finishing the knots for the net she is making for Adamanda.
The net is hanging next to Ramsa in Gamwich. Ramsa has asked for your assistance finishing the knots for the net she is making for Adamanda.
The net is hanging next to Ramsa in Gamwich. Ramsa has asked for your assistance finishing the knots for the net she is making for Adamanda.
Ramsa is in Gamwich. You should talk to Ramsa.
The net is hanging next to Ramsa in Gamwich. You should collect the net and bring it to Adamanda.
Adamanda North-took can be found near Nobottle. You should bring the net to Adamanda.
